how_cattle_may_feel: Usually normal; mild appetite or behavior changes possible
care_if_no_doctor: Provide calm environment, regular feed, clean water, avoid stress and long transport
feeding_focus: Balanced fodder, minerals, steady body condition
watch_for: Return to heat, discharge, weakness, fever

care_if_no_doctor: Daily observation, gentle movement, clean dry shelter
feeding_focus: Good quality roughage, protein, minerals, water

how_cattle_may_feel: Heavier movement, more rest, udder changes near calving
care_if_no_doctor: Prepare clean calving area, reduce crowding, keep bedding dry, monitor closely
feeding_focus: Energy-balanced ration, calcium/mineral support as locally advised, water
urgent_help_needed: Straining for long time without calf, foul smell discharge, extreme weakness

how_cattle_may_feel: Restless, tail raising, nesting behavior, mucus discharge
care_if_no_doctor: Keep area quiet and clean, observe from distance, only assist if clearly necessary and trained
urgent_help_needed: No progress after strong labor, calf stuck, heavy bleeding

how_cattle_may_feel: Tired but should become alert and care for calf
care_if_no_doctor: Offer water/feed, ensure calf gets colostrum early, keep mother and calf warm/clean
watch_for: Retained placenta, fever, not eating, weak calf
urgent_help_needed: Cannot stand, severe bleeding, bad-smelling discharge, calf not nursing
